text: ち、この期に及んで邪魔をするか！

降りかかる火の粉は払うのみ！
こやつらを倒し、先へ進むぞ！
NOW they obstruct us!? Such abhorrent timing!

Resistance must be answered in kind!
Defeat them and proceed onward!
